description: Canonical ErgoScript sources for v0 acceptance predicates. Run `npm run compile-predicates` (with `ergo-lib-wasm-nodejs` available) to populate ergoTreeHex and treeHashBlake2b256. Until the trees are populated, both fields are null and the SDK refuses mainnet writes that depend on them.

predicates.name: task_hash_v0
predicates.purpose: Note acceptance predicate. Redemption requires HEIGHT < R5 and blake2b256(getVar[0]) == R6.
predicates.source:
{
  val expiry       = R5[Int].get
  val expectedHash = R6[Coll[Byte]].get
  val taskOutput   = getVar[Coll[Byte]](0).get
  val actualHash   = blake2b256(taskOutput)
  sigmaProp(HEIGHT < expiry && actualHash == expectedHash)
}

registers.R6: expected task output hash, BLAKE2b-256 (SColl[SByte], 32 bytes)

predicates.name: credential_v0
predicates.purpose: Credential-gated Note acceptance predicate. Redemption requires HEIGHT < R5, blake2b256(getVar[0]) == R6, and proveDlog(R7).
predicates.source:
{
  val expiry       = R5[Int].get
  val expectedHash = R6[Coll[Byte]].get
  val authorizedPK = R7[GroupElement].get
  val taskOutput   = getVar[Coll[Byte]](0).get
  sigmaProp(
    HEIGHT < expiry &&
    blake2b256(taskOutput) == expectedHash &&
    proveDlog(authorizedPK)
  )
}

registers.R6: expected task output hash, BLAKE2b-256 (SColl[SByte], 32 bytes)
